title: A smaller Mace (Bare Bones)
description: Bare Bones Style Smaller Mace 1.21 Texture Pack
body:
About This Pack:

This texture pack redesigns the Minecraft 1.21 mace to match the Bare Bones aesthetic, giving it a smaller, cleaner and more minimal look. The mace has also been significantly reduced in size, making it appear smaller in-hand (while in third person looks normal sized), while keeping the original themed shape and animations intact.

Info: 

In addition to the mace’s new appearance, I also adjusted the mace.json model file to make it appear smaller when held in-hand. But In third-person view, the texture retains its normal size. If you prefer the original in-hand size (bigger), you can simply delete mace.json from the resource pack (Path: assets -> minecraft -> models -> item -> mace.json).

![This texture pack redesigns the Minecraft 1.21 mace to match the Bare Bones aesthetic, giving it a smaller, cleaner and more minimal look. The mace has also been significantly reduced in size, making it appear smaller in-hand (while in third person looks normal sized), while keeping the original themed shape and animations intact.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b9e48ee87aee67b23989a976682d4e07af0beb.png)


Installation:

Download the .zip file

Place it in your **resourcepacks** folder

Enable it in-game and enjoy!

Let me know if you'd like other Bare Bones-style weapon edits — I might expand this pack!
